items.title: Hantavirus may have spread between passengers on cruise ship, WHO says
items.dek: Two cases of the virus, which rarely spreads between humans, have been confirmed on the ship, and three people have died.
items.body: Two cases of the virus, which rarely spreads between humans, have been confirmed on the ship, and three people have died.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Romanian PM ousted in no-confidence vote
items.dek: Ilie Bolojan lost the vote after the largest party in his coalition joined the far-right opposition to depose him.
items.body: Ilie Bolojan lost the vote after the largest party in his coalition joined the far-right opposition to depose him.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Zelensky condemns Russian 'utter cynicism' as it strikes ahead of truce
items.dek: Russia demanded a ceasefire on 8 and 9 May but Ukraine said it would pause the fighting sooner, meaning any violations would be pinned on Moscow.
items.body: Russia demanded a ceasefire on 8 and 9 May but Ukraine said it would pause the fighting sooner, meaning any violations would be pinned on Moscow.
items.author: IriLine Desk
